title: CogneeCatalogEntry
description: Schema for a single entry in the Cognee Integrations Hub and Use-Case Gallery. One YAML file under catalog/entries/{integrations,use-cases,packages}/ per entry. See docs/contributing/add-catalog-entry.md.

id.description: Stable machine identifier. Lowercase, dashes, no spaces. Must match the filename stem.

title.description: Human-readable title as it appears in the Hub.

kind.description: Which view an entry belongs to. Integrations and packages appear in the Integrations Hub; use-cases appear in the Use-Case Gallery.

stack.description: Primary technology bucket. Drives filtering in the rendered Hub. `use-case` is reserved for entries where the stack is orthogonal to the outcome.

tags.description: Free-form filter tags. Redundant with stack on purpose so users can search by outcome (`document-qa`) or provider (`openai`) without a taxonomy war.

summary.description: One sentence, shown on the Hub card. Answer: does this work with my stack.

what_youll_build.description: One sentence promising a concrete outcome. Answer: what do I get if I follow the quickstart.

quickstart.description: Copy-paste block that gets a newcomer running. Include install, env, and a single run command. Multi-line YAML block scalar. No shell prompts, no wrapping backticks.

expected_output.description: Concrete output the user should see after the quickstart. Ranges/summaries are fine; exact values are not required.

difficulty.description: Rough effort estimate for a new user, not a code-complexity rating.

repo.description: Owning repository in `owner/name` form. Required for integrations and packages, optional for use-cases (which typically live in cognee/examples).

path.description: Path within `repo` to the source. Required for integrations and packages. Loader confirms the path resolves.

example_path.description: Path to a runnable example. Required for use-cases; optional for integrations and packages. Loader confirms the file exists.

inventory_slug.description: Slug in cognee-integrations/integrations/inventory.yml this entry corresponds to. Used by the drift check so an inventory entry without a catalog entry (or vice versa) fails CI.

docs_url.description: Optional link to a longer doc page (e.g. docs.cognee.ai/integrations/openai).
